Rooms.Name: Outside The East Gate
Rooms.Description:
A grand and imposing city entrance, with large black marble pillars on either
side of the gate, which has a small golden emblem embedded within it. The use
of black and gold in the description suggests a sense of opulence and
grandeur.

Rooms.Name: The East Gate of Astoria
Rooms.Description:
A grand and imposing city entrance, with large black marble pillars on either
side of the gate, which has a small golden emblem embedded within it. The use
of black and gold in the description suggests a sense of opulence and
grandeur.

Rooms.Name: Eastern Street of Astoria
Rooms.Description:
Ancient cobblestones line the street which creates an odd tempo of clacks
and thumps as horse-drawn wagons pass by, bringing merchandise and wares to
various merchants and vendors within the city. The road continues east and west.

Rooms.Name: Eastern Street of Astoria
Rooms.Description:
Ancient cobblestones line the street which creates an odd tempo of clacks
and thumps as horse-drawn wagons pass by, bringing merchandise and wares to
various merchants and vendors within the city. The road continues east and west.

Rooms.Name: Eastern Street of Astoria
Rooms.Description:
Ancient cobblestones line this four way street which creates an odd tempo of clacks
and thumps as horse-drawn wagons pass by, bringing merchandise and wares to
various merchants and vendors within the city.

Rooms.Name: Eastern Street of Astoria
Rooms.Description:
Ancient cobblestones line the street which creates an odd tempo of clacks
and thumps as horse-drawn wagons pass by, bringing merchandise and wares to
various merchants and vendors within the city. The road continues east and west.

Rooms.Name: Eastern Street of Astoria
Rooms.Description:
Ancient cobblestones line the street which creates an odd tempo of clacks
and thumps as horse-drawn wagons pass by, bringing merchandise and wares to
various merchants and vendors within the city. The road continues east and west.

Rooms.Name: The Gazebo
Rooms.Description:
Ancient cobblestones line the street of this giant gazebo, supported by massive
columns in each of the four corners. One of the busiest intersections of town,
the lound sound of clacks and thumps as horse-drawn wagons pass by, bringing
merchandise and wares to various merchants, vendors and temples within the
city.

Rooms.Name: Western Street of Astoria
Rooms.Description:
Ancient cobblestones line the street which creates an odd tempo of clacks
and thumps as horse-drawn wagons pass by, bringing merchandise and wares to
various merchants and vendors within the city. The road continues east and west.

Rooms.Name: Western Street of Astoria
Rooms.Description:
Ancient cobblestones line the street which creates an odd tempo of clacks
and thumps as horse-drawn wagons pass by, bringing merchandise and wares to
various merchants and vendors within the city. The road continues east and west.

Rooms.Name: Western Street of Astoria
Rooms.Description:
Ancient cobblestones line this four way street which creates an odd tempo of clacks
and thumps as horse-drawn wagons pass by, bringing merchandise and wares to
various merchants and vendors within the city.

Rooms.Name: Western Street of Astoria
Rooms.Description:
Ancient cobblestones line the street which creates an odd tempo of clacks
and thumps as horse-drawn wagons pass by, bringing merchandise and wares to
various merchants and vendors within the city. The road continues east and west.

Rooms.Name: Western Street of Astoria
Rooms.Description:
Ancient cobblestones line the street which creates an odd tempo of clacks
and thumps as horse-drawn wagons pass by, bringing merchandise and wares to
various merchants and vendors within the city. The road continues east and west.

Rooms.Name: Western Gate
Rooms.Description:
A grand and imposing city entrance, with large black marble pillars on either
side of the gate, which has a small golden emblem embedded within it. The use
of black and gold in the description suggests a sense of opulence and
grandeur.

Rooms.Name: Outside the Western Gate
Rooms.Description:
A grand and imposing city entrance, with large black marble pillars on either
side of the gate, which has a small golden emblem embedded within it. The use
of black and gold in the description suggests a sense of opulence and
grandeur.

Rooms.Name: Communer Lane
Rooms.Description:
Magical spheres of light replace street lamps here, illuminating the pathway
almost as well as the high-noon sun. Some strange etchings appear on various 
walls and windowsills, like some secret language revealing a higher knowledge
of things beyond understanding. The lane continues to the north.

Rooms.Name: Communer Lane
Rooms.Description:
Magical spheres of light replace street lamps here, illuminating the pathway
almost as well as the high-noon sun. Some strange etchings appear on various 
walls and windowsills, like some secret language revealing a higher knowledge
of things beyond understanding. The lane continues to the north and south.

Rooms.Name: Communer Lane
Rooms.Description:
Magical spheres of light replace street lamps here, illuminating the pathway
almost as well as the high-noon sun. Some strange etchings appear on various 
walls and windowsills, like some secret language revealing a higher knowledge
of things beyond understanding. The lane continues north and south, the priest
to the east.

Rooms.Name: Communer Lane
Rooms.Description:
Magical spheres of light replace street lamps here, illuminating the pathway
almost as well as the high-noon sun. Some strange etchings appear on various 
walls and windowsills, like some secret language revealing a higher knowledge
of things beyond understanding. The lane continues north and south.

Rooms.Description:

almost as well as the high-noon sun. Some strange etchings appear on various 
walls and windowsills, like some secret language revealing a higher knowledge
of things beyond understanding. The lane continues north and south.

Rooms.Name: Communer Lane
Rooms.Description:
Magical spheres of light replace street lamps here, illuminating the pathway
almost as well as the high-noon sun. Some strange etchings appear on various 
walls and windowsills, like some secret language revealing a higher knowledge
of things beyond understanding. The lane continues north and south, the
paladin's guild lies to the east.

Rooms.Name: Communer Lane
Rooms.Description:
Magical spheres of light replace street lamps here, illuminating the pathway
almost as well as the high-noon sun. Some strange etchings appear on various 
walls and windowsills, like some secret language revealing a higher knowledge
of things beyond understanding. The lane continues north and south.

Rooms.Name: Communer Lane
Rooms.Description:
Magical spheres of light replace street lamps here, illuminating the pathway
almost as well as the high-noon sun. Some strange etchings appear on various 
walls and windowsills, like some secret language revealing a higher knowledge
of things beyond understanding. The lane continues north and south.

Rooms.Name: Communer Lane
Rooms.Description:
Magical spheres of light replace street lamps here, illuminating the pathway
almost as well as the high-noon sun. Some strange etchings appear on various 
walls and windowsills, like some secret language revealing a higher knowledge
of things beyond understanding. The lane continues north and south, the healers
guild lies to the east.

Rooms.Name: Wendy's Shop of Magic
Rooms.Description:
Bells ring as you enter the shop, signaling the owner a patron has entered.
A long smooth counter lines one wall of the room, clear of all clutter except
for a large crystal ball. Strange devices hang from hooks in the ceiling along
one wall, while the other side is lined with shelves containing various plants
and shrubs.

Rooms.Name: The Shamans Guild
Rooms.Description:
Walking into this extravegant looking guild, the first thing that you notice is
a small shrine in the middle of the room. Its the Shrine of the Great Shamans
Guild. The floor is made of solid wood and is coverd in a huge blue rug thathas
pictures of chalices and crosses on it. In the middle of the where the shrine
sits is a medium whie cloth with a shield and two swords crossing the shield,
sitting underneath the shine.

Rooms.Name: The Paladins Guild
Rooms.Description:
Walking into this dreary looking guild, the first thing that you notice is a
small modest shrine in the middle of the room, representing all paladins who
have trained and died fighting in the defense of others. Beneath the shrine is
a purple cloth embeded with a sword and shield, the symbol of traditional
defense of the innocent. The floor is made of solid wood and is worn smooth
with various notches from all the sword practice.

Rooms.Name: Clerics Sanctuary
Rooms.Description:
Walking into this guild, the first thing that you notice is the smell of
disinfectant and incense. A small modest shrine in the middle of the room,
where various scented candles burn, creating a relaxing atmosphere for healing.
The floor is made of solid wood and is waxed and buffed to a mirror-like shine.

Rooms.Name: The Priests Guidance
Rooms.Description:
The extravagance of this room is intense to say the least. Gaudy chandeliers
of gold and silver hang from the vaulted ceiling all lit with fragrant candles
made with gold flecks within the wax. An elder is here dressed in all white,
with a blue emblem upon her chest depicting a chalice and cross. No expense was
spared to display an arrogance of superiority and position of the elder here.

Rooms.Name: The Paladins Guidance
Rooms.Description:
You see one single elder here sitting on a cold stone chair, completely lacking
any cushion for comfort. While still gripping his ancient sword and shield, you
can't help but notice the scars across both his face and forearms. Symbols of
campaigns to rescue the innocent fill the single mural on the wall.

Rooms.Name: Clerics Guidance
Rooms.Description:
You see a multitude of elders perched on comfortable cushioned chairs,
surrounding the outside walls of the room. Symbols of snakes and other
wildlife fill the murals on the walls above the elders, all depicting
various stages of healing or death. The elders invite you to aks your questions
without delay, so they may get back to their contemplations.

Rooms.Name: Adventurers Lane
Rooms.Description:
This clean cobblestone street shows little wear. Less used by wagons or
merchants, due to the lack of shops along the lane. The lane continues south.

Rooms.Name: Adventurers Lane
Rooms.Description:
This clean cobblestone street shows little wear. Less used by wagons or
merchants, due to the lack of shops along the lane. The lane continues
north and south.

Rooms.Name: Adventurers Lane
Rooms.Description:
This clean cobblestone street shows little wear. Less used by wagons or
merchants, due to the lack of shops along the lane. The lane continues
north and south. To the east you see a guild.

Rooms.Name: Adventurers Lane
Rooms.Description:
This clean cobblestone street shows little wear. Less used by wagons or
merchants, due to the lack of shops along the lane. The lane continues
north and south.

Rooms.Name: Adventurers Lane
Rooms.Description:
This clean cobblestone street shows little wear. Less used by wagons or
merchants, due to the lack of shops along the lane. The lane continues
north and south.

Rooms.Name: Adventurers Lane
Rooms.Description:
This clean cobblestone street shows little wear. Less used by wagons or
merchants, due to the lack of shops along the lane. The lane continues
north and south. To the east you see a guild.

Rooms.Name: Adventurers Lane
Rooms.Description:
This clean cobblestone street shows little wear. Less used by wagons or
merchants, due to the lack of shops along the lane. The lane continues
north and south.

Rooms.Name: Adventurers Lane
Rooms.Description:
This clean cobblestone street shows little wear. Less used by wagons or
merchants, due to the lack of shops along the lane. The lane continues
north and south.

Rooms.Name: Adventurers Lane
Rooms.Description:
This clean cobblestone street shows little wear. Less used by wagons or
merchants, due to the lack of shops along the lane. The lane continues
north and south. To the east you see a guild.

Rooms.Name: Adventurers Lane
Rooms.Description:
This clean cobblestone street shows little wear. Less used by wagons or
merchants, due to the lack of shops along the lane. The lane continues
north, but evidence shows work being done to continue the lane further.

Rooms.Name: Warriors Guild
Rooms.Description:
All the walls here are lined with padding, each corner featuring a weapon rack
full of implements of various specialties. The floor looks to be swept and
mopped often, yet old sweat and blood stains have set in from the years of
hard work and practice.

Rooms.Name: Thiefs Guild
Rooms.Description:
Entry into this room is by invitation only. A large sign at the entrance lists
10 rules you can never break, the first of which states "Death to any who break
3 or more of the following rules!" Full sized statues wearing various types of
clothing are arranged throughout the room, many a thief practicing their pick
pocket skills.

Rooms.Name: Guard Station
Rooms.Description:
A small, fortified structure is used to schedule guard rotation. The shack
is located out of the way so as to not intrude on the citizens of Astoria.

Rooms.Name: Warriors Training
Rooms.Description:
In a small room with few decorations an old yet hard muscled man sits, waiting
to approve or disaprove advancement within the guild. A podium stands beside
the trainer, with the book open to your name, along side an ink pot and pen.

Rooms.Name: Thiefs Guidance
Rooms.Description:
A luxuriously furished room is filled with well dressed men and women, enjoying
drinks and snacks, much like what you would expect at a party. An old wrinkled
man hides in the shadows of a corner, waiting for students to complete their
test to prove they are worthy to advance.

Rooms.Name: Guard Shack
Rooms.Description:
A small, fortified structure is used to schedule guard rotation. The shack
is located out of the way so as to not intrude on the citizens of Astoria.

Rooms.Name: Ryhmers Path
Rooms.Description:
The road is surrounded by trees and brush with a variety of wildlife adding to
the symphony of sounds in the air. The scent of blooming flowers and freshly cut
grass mixes with the natural scents of the forest. The rustling of leaves,
chirping of birds, and occasional calls of animals create a harmonious rhythm in
the surroundings. The beauty of nature can be seen and heard with every step,
making the journey all the more worthwhile.
The road continues north and south.

Rooms.Name: Rhymers Path
Rooms.Description:
The road is surrounded by trees and brush with a variety of wildlife adding to
the symphony of sounds in the air. The scent of blooming flowers and freshly cut
grass mixes with the natural scents of the forest. The rustling of leaves,
chirping of birds, and occasional calls of animals create a harmonious rhythm in
the surroundings. The beauty of nature can be seen and heard with every step,
making the journey all the more worthwhile.
The road continues north and south.

the surroundings. The beauty of nature can be seen and heard with every step,
making the journey all the more worthwhile.
The road continues north and south,
and a guild lies to the west.

Rooms.Description:
The road is surrounded by trees and brush with a variety of wildlife adding to
the symphony of sounds in the air. The scent of blooming flowers and freshly cut
grass mixes with the natural scents of the forest. The rustling of leaves,
chirping of birds, and occasional calls of animals create a harmonious rhythm in
the surroundings. The beauty of nature can be seen and heard with every step,
making the journey all the more worthwhile.
The road continues north and south,
or you could jump down into a river.

Rooms.Name: Inside the South Gate
Rooms.Description:
A grand and imposing city entrance, with large black marble pillars on either
side of the gate, which has a small golden emblem embedded within it. The use
of black and gold in the description suggests a sense of opulence and
grandeur.

Rooms.Name: Outside the South Gate
Rooms.Description:
A grand and imposing city entrance, with large black marble pillars on either
side of the gate, which has a small golden emblem embedded within it. The use
of black and gold in the description suggests a sense of opulence and
grandeur.

Rooms.Name: Bards Guild
Rooms.Description:
A giant peg board lines three of the four walls of this room, multiple hooks
holding every kind of musical instrument you can imagine. To either side of
the north door, wooden racks stand from floor to ceiling hold the larger
contraptions that are too heavy to carry.

Rooms.Name: Bards Guidance
Rooms.Description:
The walls of this room are lined with heavy wool strips pleated and sewn
together, with a thick coating of tree sap and bees wax. Upon entering, you
realize that the acoustics here are superb. An ancient man is here, waiting
on you to begin your audition.

Rooms.Name: hollow tree
Rooms.Description:
You have stepped into a huge, hollow tree. Despite the large area hollowed out,
the living tree seems health and strong. The inner cavity is covered in thick
bark, protecting itself from it's intruders. Thick grass mixed with moss line
the ground, making it a comfortable place to take a rest.

Rooms.Name: hollow tree
Rooms.Description:
You have stepped further into the hollow tree. The inner cavity here is also
covered in thick bark, protecting itself from intruders. Thick grass mixed
with moss line the ground, making it a comfortable place to take a rest.

Rooms.Name: Soothsayer Lane
Rooms.Description:
The road here is paved with an assortment of crystals and gems of all shapes
sizes, gaps between each filled with a fine powder, and a final overlay of
clear shellac. Much less traveled than others in the city, the atmosphere of
this lane vibrates with a strange occult sensation. The lane continues north.

Rooms.Name: Soothsayer Lane
Rooms.Description:
The road here is paved with an assortment of crystals and gems of all shapes
sizes, gaps between each filled with a fine powder, and a final overlay of
clear shellac. Much less traveled than others in the city, the atmosphere of
this lane vibrates with a strange occult sensation. The lane continues north
and south.

Rooms.Name: Soothsayer Lane
Rooms.Description:
The road here is paved with an assortment of crystals and gems of all shapes
sizes, gaps between each filled with a fine powder, and a final overlay of
clear shellac. Much less traveled than others in the city, the atmosphere of
this lane vibrates with a strange occult sensation. The lane continues north
and south, a guild lies to the west.

Rooms.Description:
The road here is paved with an assortment of crystals and gems of all shapes
sizes, gaps between each filled with a fine powder, and a final overlay of
clear shellac. Much less traveled than others in the city, the atmosphere of
this lane vibrates with a strange occult sensation. The lane continues north
and south.

Rooms.Description:

sizes, gaps between each filled with a fine powder, and a final overlay of
clear shellac. Much less traveled than others in the city, the atmosphere of
this lane vibrates with a strange occult sensation. The lane continues north

this lane vibrates with a strange occult sensation. The lane continues north

Rooms.Description:

sizes, gaps between each filled with a fine powder, and a final overlay of
clear shellac. Much less traveled than others in the city, the atmosphere of
this lane vibrates with a strange occult sensation. The lane continues north

Rooms.Description:
The road here is paved with an assortment of crystals and gems of all shapes
sizes, gaps between each filled with a fine powder, and a final overlay of
clear shellac. Much less traveled than others in the city, the atmosphere of
this lane vibrates with a strange occult sensation. The lane continues north
and south.

Rooms.Name: Soothsayer Lane
Rooms.Description:
The road here is paved with an assortment of crystals and gems of all shapes
sizes, gaps between each filled with a fine powder, and a final overlay of
clear shellac. Much less traveled than others in the city, the atmosphere of
this lane vibrates with a strange occult sensation. The lane continues north
and south.

Rooms.Name: Dead End
Rooms.Description:
The road here is paved with an assortment of crystals and gems of all shapes
sizes, gaps between each filled with a fine powder, and a final overlay of
clear shellac. The lane ends here, a dead end but with further construction
evident. The lane continues to the south.

Rooms.Name: Shapeshifters Guild
Rooms.Description:
The entrance to the shapeshifters guild is an imposing stone archway, carved
with intricate patterns and symbols that represent the shapeshifters' connection
to nature and their ability to transform into various creatures. At the
entrance, a high-level shapeshifter stands guard, their animal form radiating a
sense of power and strength. The shapeshifter observes anyone who approaches,
gauging their intentions and testing their respect for nature before allowing
them entry.

Rooms.Name: Shapeshifter Guidance
Rooms.Description:
As you enter the shapeshifters guild, you are greeted by air that is thick with
the smell of wood burning in the fireplace, and the walls are lined with shelves
filled with books on anatomy, biology, and animal behavior. The students can be
seen in various forms, practicing their transformations in designated areas or
studying in groups. There is a sense of harmony and tranquility within the
guild, and the sounds of birds and other woodland creatures can be heard in the
background.

Rooms.Name: Mages Guild
Rooms.Description:
The walls of the mages guild are full of mystical symbols, none of which can
be understood by the common mind. Several robed figures mill around discussing
incomprehensible things with unintelligible words and hand motions.

Rooms.Name: Mages Guidance
Rooms.Description:
As you enter this dark and silent room you hear a voice in your head asking you
if you are worthy to learn new spells yet. Obviously, without the power to
detect the invisible, it would feel as if the bodyless voice was from a spirit.

Rooms.Name: Temple Altar
Rooms.Description:
A giant altar stands tall and gaudy in the middle of this room. There are
various depictions of scenery etched into the altar, from the bloom of new
life to the death of a star. No one god is represented here, but all gods of 
all faiths are welcome. The room is simple of fashion, all decorations designed
to display the altar front and center.

Rooms.Name: Temple Bath
Rooms.Description:
Smooth marble stones along the bath floor present a very real slip hazzard to
worshipers who partake in the ceremonial bath celebrations.

Rooms.Name: Temple of the Sun
Rooms.Description:
Brightly lit chandeliers hang from the vaulted ceiling, revealing all,
forever vanquishing all shadows. Various cushioned benches line the
walls for worshipers to kneel or pray as needed.

Rooms.Name: Temple of The Shadow
Rooms.Description:
Dimly lit chandeliers hang from the vaulted ceiling, revealing very little,
multiple shadows provide many hiding placesa. Various cushioned benches line
the walls for worshipers to kneel or pray as needed.

Rooms.Name: Temple of The Moon
Rooms.Description:
This temple room features a large dome window in the ceiling above. Without 
artificial lighting, the room is bathed completely in natural light from 
either the sun or the moon. Multiple mirrors are placed strategically in the 
upper corners to reflect the lesser moonlight at night, yet can be turned up 
and away during the daytime.

Rooms.Name: Merchants Lane
Rooms.Description:
The road is made with solid rock fit tightly together. Wide enough for four
wagons abreast, this is one lively street, merchants and hawkers line both
sides of the street. The center of the street is humped, allowing rain to
flow to the sides and into the gutters. The lane continues north and south.

Rooms.Name: Merchants Lane
Rooms.Description:
The road is made with solid rock fit tightly together. Wide enough for four
wagons abreast, this is one lively street, merchants and hawkers line both
sides of the street. The center of the street is humped, allowing rain to
flow to the sides and into the gutters. The lane continues north and south,
merchant shops lie to the east and the west.

Rooms.Name: Merchants Lane
Rooms.Description:
The road is made with solid rock fit tightly together. Wide enough for four
wagons abreast, this is one lively street, merchants and hawkers line both
sides of the street. The center of the street is humped, allowing rain to
flow to the sides and into the gutters. The lane continues north and south.

Rooms.Name: Merchants Lane
Rooms.Description:
The road is made with solid rock fit tightly together. Wide enough for four
wagons abreast, this is one lively street, merchants and hawkers line both
sides of the street. The center of the street is humped, allowing rain to
flow to the sides and into the gutters. The lane continues north and south.

Rooms.Name: Merchants Lane
Rooms.Description:
The road is made with solid rock fit tightly together. Wide enough for four
wagons abreast, this is one lively street, merchants and hawkers line both
sides of the street. The center of the street is humped, allowing rain to
flow to the sides and into the gutters. The lane continues north and south,
merchant shops lie to the east and the west.

Rooms.Name: Merchants Lane
Rooms.Description:
The road is made with solid rock fit tightly together. Wide enough for four
wagons abreast, this is one lively street, merchants and hawkers line both
sides of the street. The center of the street is humped, allowing rain to
flow to the sides and into the gutters. The lane continues north and south.

Rooms.Name: Merchants Lane
Rooms.Description:
The road is made with solid rock fit tightly together. Wide enough for four
wagons abreast, this is one lively street, merchants and hawkers line both
sides of the street. The center of the street is humped, allowing rain to
flow to the sides and into the gutters. The lane continues north, merchant
shops lie to the east and the west.

Rooms.Name: General Store
Rooms.Description:
Clean and organized, this shop seems to have all the neccessary conveniences
one may want as they travel and explore. From small kayaks, various sized sacks
and canteens, You can be sure to find what you need.

Rooms.Name: Blacksmith
Rooms.Description:
The forge roars at all hours, its heat spilling into the front of the shop where
racks of gleaming swords, battleaxes, and chainmail sets await buyers. An anvil sits near
the entrance, dented from years of use, and the air carries a thick scent of molten metal
and burning coal. The counter bears deep scratches, likely from impatient warriors testing
blades before paying.

Rooms.Name: Tanners Shop
Rooms.Description:
A sweet smell of cured leathers and skins fill the air here. Tables line the
walls, displaying all the leathers in an organized manner. Brown, green, or
even camouflage, all guarenteed to be water and sun resistant, perfect for
all your outdoor travel needs.

Rooms.Name: Alchemist Store
Rooms.Description:
The Alchemist Store smells of crushed herbs, bitter roots, and faintly sweet vapors. Shelves packed with vials, jars, and strange ingredients line the walls, some softly
glowing or bubbling. A worn wooden counter stands at the back, cluttered with tools and glassware, while a small flame warms a brass apparatus nearby.

Dried plants hang from the rafters, and scorch marks on the floor hint at past mishaps. Despite the clutter, everything feels purposeful, as if each item serves a hidden design.

Rooms.Name: Axe and Dagger
Rooms.Description:
As you enter you notice a huge sign on the wall which states "We will not be
held responsible for accidents or bloodshed within the establishment." Row
upon row of smaller daggers and swords are displayed on open tables, weapon
stands along the walls contain taller weapons such as staffs and polearms. All
appear freshly sharpened and ready for immediate use.

Rooms.Name: Krolicks BBQ
Rooms.Description:
As you walk in you hear lots of yelling from behind the counter. You see cooks
and trainees working hard preparing all the custom orders received. Although
many items on the menu include chicken or pork, all seem to be doused with the
same, hot spicy bbq sauce that Krolicks is famous for.

Rooms.Name: The Trainer
Rooms.Description:
You are in the room with the trainer. He has learned many valuable lessons to
be shared with the endeavoring adventurer.

Rooms.Name: The Bank
Rooms.Description:
Vaults line the eastern wall. Your belongings could be in
any of them. A banker stands here to take your gold.

Rooms.Name: Park Avenue
Rooms.Description:
This avenue is so pristine you could eat off the ground. Mansions line the road
where the city leaders and the rich live. Multiple signs can be seen on both
sides of the avenue, all stating rules about what can and can't be done, such
as "Keep of the grass" or "Stay to the right."

Rooms.Name: Park Avenue
Rooms.Description:
This avenue is so pristine you could eat off the ground. Mansions line the road 
where the city leaders and the rich live. Multiple signs can be seen on both
sides of the avenue, all stating rules about what can and can't be done, such
as "Keep of the grass" or "Stay to the right."

Rooms.Name: Park Avenue Intersection
Rooms.Description:
This avenue is so pristine you could eat off the ground. Multiple signs can be seen on both
sides of the avenue, all stating rules about what can and can't be done, such
as "Keep of the grass" or "Stay to the right." Pearl Avenue lies to the north.

Rooms.Name: Pearl Avenue
Rooms.Description:
This avenue is so pristine you could eat off the ground. Mansions line the road 
where the city leaders and the rich live. Multiple signs can be seen on both
sides of the avenue, all stating rules about what can and can't be done, such
as "Keep of the grass" or "Stay to the right."

Rooms.Name: Park Avenue
Rooms.Description:
This avenue is so pristine you could eat off the ground. Mansions line the road 
where the city leaders and the rich live. Multiple signs can be seen on both
sides of the avenue, all stating rules about what can and can't be done, such
as "Keep of the grass" or "Stay to the right."

Rooms.Name: Park Avenue
Rooms.Description:
This avenue is so pristine you could eat off the ground. Mansions line the road 
where the city leaders and the rich live. Multiple signs can be seen on both
sides of the avenue, all stating rules about what can and can't be done, such
as "Keep of the grass" or "Stay to the right.

Rooms.Name: Inside the North Gate
Rooms.Description:
A grand and imposing city entrance, with large black marble pillars on either
side of the gate, which has a small golden emblem embedded within it. The use
of black and gold in the description suggests a sense of opulence and
grandeur.

Rooms.Name: Outside the North Gate
Rooms.Description:
A grand and imposing city entrance, with large black marble pillars on either
side of the gate, which has a small golden emblem embedded within it. The use
of black and gold in the description suggests a sense of opulence and
grandeur.

Rooms.Name: Monks Guild
Rooms.Description:
A serene stillness fills the entrance of the Monk's Guild, where faint incense lingers
in the air. A stone fountain at the center flows endlessly, symbolizing balance and discipline.
Polished wooden beams overhead bear ancient teachings, while a scroll on the eastern
wall outlines the guild's tenets.

Rooms.Name: Monks Guidance
Rooms.Description:
A deep silence lingers here, broken only by the soft crackle of incense. A low wooden
table, adorned with ancient scrolls and prayer beads, sits at the center. Etched proverbs
line the walls, offering wisdom to those who seek it. A small shrine in the corner honors
past masters, their presence felt in the teachings passed down.

Rooms.Name: Secret Alcove
Rooms.Description:
You see a dimly lit space with thick stone walls, an alcove hidden away for
concealment. Adorned with dark tapestries and flickering candles, and
filled with a library of arcane knowledge, including forbidden texts on the
art of assassination and dark magic. This hidden secret chamber is
accessible only to the most trusted members of the guild.

Mobiles.LongDescription: The trainer stands here, ready to teach you his ways.
A bank teller stands here, ready to take your gold.
Mobiles.Description:
The bank teller is a prim and proper figure. She has a demure smile, a small
nose, and soft blue eyes that reflect her impeccable attention to detail. Her
hair is styled in a fashionable updo, adorned with a delicate hat that adds to
her sophisticated appearance. Her skin is a warm, creamy complexion, and she
carries herself with grace and poise. She radiates an aura of efficiency and
professionalism, her meticulous nature inspiring trust in her customers. Despite
her quiet demeanor, she is well-versed in the intricacies of finance, and her
expertise in managing money is second to none.

Mobiles.LongDescription: Krolick stands at the counter, his bare arms completely covered in BBQ sauce.
Mobiles.Description: A big bearded, bare-armed man is covered in BBQ sauce up to his elbows.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A weapon master is here.
Mobiles.Description: A big barrel-chested man is behind the counter ready to sell you something sharp.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A tanner is here.
Mobiles.Description: A short man is behind the counter ready to sell you some gear.

Mobiles.LongDescription: Malrik the alchemist is here.
Mobiles.Description:
Malrik is a wiry old man, his robes stained with the remnants of countless
experiments. Thick goggles rest on his forehead, and his sharp eyes glint with both
curiosity and wisdom. A mischievous smirk and cryptic remarks hint at secrets, perhaps
even the key to immortality. The scent of burnt herbs clings to him as he absently twirls
a vial of shimmering liquid.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A shopkeeper is here.
Mobiles.Description: A Grumpy old man beckons you over.

Mobiles.LongDescription: Wendy the shopkeeper is here.
Mobiles.Description: A lovely lady beckons you over.

Mobiles.LongDescription: The warrior guildmaster stands here, ready to teach you his ways.
Mobiles.Description:
The warrior guildmaster is a formidable figure with a tall and athletic build.
She has a sharp jawline, a straight nose, and intense brown eyes that seem to
see right through you. Her hair is a deep auburn, styled in a practical braid
that keeps it out of her face during combat. Her skin is weathered from years
of training and battles, bearing the scars of her experiences as badges of
honor. She exudes a confident and fearless energy, her presence commanding
respect and inspiring courage in those around her. She stands tall and proud,
ready to face any challenge that comes her way.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A guard is here, protecting the warrior guild from intruders.
Mobiles.Description: A big, strong guild guard.

Mobiles.LongDescription: The paladin guildmaster stands here, ready to teach you his ways.
Mobiles.Description:
The paladin guildmaster is a tall and muscular figure with a chiseled jawline,
a straight nose, and piercing green eyes. He has bright golden blonde hair
styled in a regal manner. His presence commands respect and his bearing exudes
a sense of justice and righteousness. His unwavering spirit and powerful aura
inspire those around him to be brave and to fight for what is right.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A guard is here, protecting the paladin guild from intruders.
Mobiles.Description: A big, strong guild guard.

Mobiles.LongDescription: The cleric guildmaster stands here, ready to teach you his ways.
Mobiles.Description:
The Cleric Guildmaster is a dignified man in flowing ivory and gold robes, marked with sacred
symbols of his order. His silver-streaked hair and steady, piercing gaze
reflect wisdom and authority earned through years of devotion.

He carries a rune-carved staff and wears a faintly glowing amulet, both radiating quiet divine
power. Calm and composed, he guides his followers with firm conviction - offering healing
and guidance to the faithful, and swift judgment to those who stray.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A guard is here, protecting the healer guild from intruders.
Mobiles.Description: A short, skinny guild guard.

Mobiles.LongDescription: The thief guildmaster stands here, ready to teach you his ways.
Mobiles.Description:
The thief guildmaster is a slender and nimble figure with a quick wit and a
charming smile. He has a sharp jawline, a crooked nose, and sparkling brown eyes
that seem to always be on the lookout for his next big score. His hair is a
shaggy mop of black, styled in a manner that adds to his roguish charm. He moves
with a feline grace, his confidence and cunning evident in every step. Despite
his sometimes questionable methods, he has a charismatic personality and a
silver tongue that makes him well-liked by his fellow thieves.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A guard is here, protecting the thief guild from intruders.
Mobiles.Description: A short, stocky guild guard.

Mobiles.LongDescription: The mage guildmaster stands here, ready to teach you her ways.
Mobiles.Description:
The mage guildmaster is a serene and regal figure with an ethereal beauty. She
has a delicate jawline, a straight nose, and piercing blue eyes that seem to
shimmer with an inner light. Her hair is a shining silver, styled in an
elaborate up-do that adds to her stately appearance. Her skin is a warm,
creamy complexion, and she carries herself with grace and poise. She radiates
an aura of calm and confidence, her gentle presence inspiring a sense of peace
and security in those around her. Despite her quiet demeanor, her vast
knowledge and mastery of magic is undeniable.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A guard is here, protecting the mage guild from intruders.
Mobiles.Description: A short, skinny guild guard.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A healer is here, selling spells.
Mobiles.Description: Although retired from adventuring, the healer still lends a hand. Type 'heal' to see a listing of spells.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A cityguard is here, guarding the gate alertly.
Mobiles.Description:
The city guard stands tall and imposing on the streets, their broad shoulders
and sturdy frame making them a reassuring presence for the citizens. They have a
strong jawline, a straight nose, and piercing green eyes that reflect their
vigilance and attention to detail. Their hair is a short crop, styled in a
practical manner that doesn't distract from their duties. Their skin is rough
and tanned from the sun, bearing the marks of a life spent outdoors. They carry
themselves with confidence and authority, their posture straight and their gait
steady. Despite their intimidating appearance, they are known to have a stern
but fair demeanor, earning the respect of the people they serve and protect.

Mobiles.LongDescription: Blacksmith Thane Ironjaw stands at the counter, waiting for your order.
Mobiles.Description:
Thane Ironjaw is a towering, broad-shouldered man with the physique of
someone who has spent a lifetime hammering steel. His arms are thick with muscle,
bearing countless burn scars from stray embers and molten metal. A long, grizzled beard,
once deep auburn, now streaked with silver, frames his square jaw, giving him the look
of a battle-hardened veteran. His dark eyes gleam like tempered steel, ever watchful over
his shop's wares and ers alike. His leather apron, heavy with soot, smells faintly of
iron and sweat, and his hands, calloused and strong, move with practiced ease as he
inspects blades and hammers.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A pet shop boy is here, humming gently.
Mobiles.Description: He is young and close-cropped and looks quite happy.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A small loyal kitten is here.
Mobiles.Description: The kitten looks like a cute, little, fierce fighter.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A small loyal puppy is here.
Mobiles.Description: The puppy looks like a cute, little, fierce fighter.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A small, quick, loyal beagle is here.
Mobiles.Description: The beagle looks like a fierce fighter.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A large, loyal rottweiler is here.
Mobiles.Description: The rottweiler looks like a strong, fierce fighter.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A large, trained wolf is here.
Mobiles.Description: The wolf looks like a strong, fearless fighter.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A loyal eagle circles overhead.
Mobiles.Description: The eagle looks like a strong fierce fighter.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A large, faithful lion is here.
Mobiles.Description: The great lion looks very fierce.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A great, loyal tiger is here.
Mobiles.Description: The large, striped tiger looks like a savage fighter.

Mobiles.LongDescription: The captain is here, scheduling the guard rotation for the day.
Mobiles.Description: A big, strong guard captain.

Mobiles.LongDescription: An angry looking guard lieutenant glares at you.
Mobiles.Description: An angry guard captain.

Mobiles.LongDescription: The bard guildmaster stands here, ready to teach you his ways.
Mobiles.Description:
The guildmaster is a tall and regal looking figure, with long flowing silver
hair and piercing green eyes. He wears a garb of rich purple and gold,
adorned with intricate musical symbols embroidered along the hem and sleeves.
A lute is hung from a strap across his back, and a small harp is clasped in
his hand. A charming smile graces his lips, and his voice is like honey,
soothing the soul and captivating all who hear it. He exuded a sense of wisdom
and leadership, and his mere presence commands respect from all those around.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A guard is here, protecting the bards guild from intruders.
Mobiles.Description:
The guard is a formidable figure, standing tall and proud at the entrance to
the bard's guild. She is dressed in gleaming silver armor, adorned with musical
notes etched in gold. Her long cape, made of the finest velvet, flows in the
breeze, while her helmet is shaped like a lyre, symbolizing the music she
protects. In one hand, she holds a wooden dagger, the blade made of a magical
wood that never breaks and the point shining like a star. In the other hand,
she carrys a lute, ready to strum a tune if needed.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A traveling bard sits here, displaying his wares.
Mobiles.Description:
Dressed in ornate robes of emerald green and golden yellow, with a lute hanging
from a strap across their back, this traveling bard exudes an air of confidence
and pride. His long, curly hair is tied back in a messy bun, revealing a face
full of character and charisma. He is surrounded by a collection of instruments
of all shapes and sizes.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A guard is here, protecting the assassin guild from intruders.
Mobiles.Description: A tall, agile guild guard.

Mobiles.LongDescription: The monk guildmaster stands here, ready to teach you his ways.
Mobiles.Description:
A master of discipline, Zhen Taoru commands respect through wisdom, not force. His
amber eyes hold the weight of countless lessons, and his movements, fluid and precise,
reflect decades of training. Draped in a simple robe, he speaks in measured riddles,
guiding students toward their own truths.

A worn wooden staff rests at his side, a symbol of mastery rather than necessity. Though
age has tempered his stride, none doubt his ability to wield it with effortless precision.

Mobiles.LongDescription: The squirming tail is here, recently detached from a lizard.
Mobiles.Description: The detached lizard tail is squirming and contorting as if it still has a life of its own.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A vicious wolf is here, serving its master.
Mobiles.Description:
A large, muscular wolf with pointed ears, sharp teeth and claws and piercing
eyes is here. Its fur a shade of gray with brown sprinkled in, with a
streamlined body built for speed and agility.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A vicious serpent is here, serving its master.
Mobiles.Description:
A long, sinuous serpent with smooth scales and a flickering tongue is here. Its
body is lithe and flexible, able to move swiftly and gracefully through the
underbrush. Its scales are a shade of green with black spots, and it has a
triangular head with sharp fangs. The serpent's eyes appear to be be keen and
watchful, and it moves with a fluid, serpentine grace.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A viscious bear is here, serving its master.
Mobiles.Description:
A massive, hulking bear with shaggy fur, sharp claws, and a powerful build is
here. Its fur is a shade of brown, and it has a broad, rounded head with small
ears and snout. Its eyes would are deep-set and watchful, and it moves with a
lumbering, yet surprisingly quick gait. Despite its size and strength, the bear
seems to possess a certain grace and fluidity of movement, as well as a primal,
untamed energy.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A vicious owl is here, serving its master.
Mobiles.Description:
A vicious owl with sharp talons and beak are prominently displayed, ready to
strike at any moment. Its eyes are intense and focused, scanning the
surroundings for potential prey. Its feathers are dark and sleek, allowing it to
move swiftly and silently through the air. Overall, the vicious owl exudes a
sense of power and danger, both feared and respected by those who encountered
it.

Mobiles.LongDescription: The shapeshifter guildmaster stands here, ready to teach you its ways.
Mobiles.Description:
The guildmaster of the shapeshifters guild is a wise and mysterious figure,
known simply as the Elder. Whether male or female, their appearance is that of a
person who has lived many lives, with eyes that seem to hold the knowledge of
the ages. The Elder is revered by all who enter the guild, their words carrying
the weight of centuries of shapeshifting lore and wisdom. They have dedicated
their life to the art of shapeshifting and are a master of all animal forms,
able to shift effortlessly from one creature to another. The Elder is patient
and compassionate, yet fierce in their determination to protect the balance
between humans and nature. Their guidance is sought by all shapeshifters who
seek to deepen their understanding of the natural world and hone their
shapeshifting skills.

Mobiles.LongDescription: A guard is here, protecting the shapeshifter guild from intruders.
Mobiles.Description: A short, skinny guild guard.

Mobiles.LongDescription: Seraphel, Guardian of Light, is here, seeking out Ravenshadow.
Mobiles.Description:
Radiant, with golden locks that shimmer like sunlight. Her eyes are a
serene shade of azure, reflecting her calm and steadfast nature. Clad in
gleaming silver armor, she carries a sword that emanates a soft, ethereal
glow, signifying her divine allegiance.

Mobiles.LongDescription: Ravenshadow, The Chaosbringer is here, causing havoc.
Mobiles.Description:
Tall, wiry, with jet-black hair that cascades over a pale, gaunt face. Eyes
are a deep shade of crimson, almost resembling pools of blood. Wears dark,
tattered robes that flutter as if caught in a ceaseless, stormy wind. His
presence is accompanied by the eerie cawing of unseen ravens.
